# We've got you covered Two locations to serve you

At Lawen Dentistry, our mission is to treat you as our family and friends. And that’s exactly what we do at both of our convenient Halifax locations. Whichever location is in your community, you can count on the most comprehensive and current dental care in a warm, professional environment. Our teams of experienced dental professionals will listen to your concerns, meet your needs, and exceed your expectations.

Image

![Exterior of 7073 Mumford Road Dental Office in the West22 Living Building](https://www.ourdentist.ca/sites/www.ourdentist.ca/files/styles/extra_large/public/images/mumford-exterior.webp?itok=5lEnwNRP)

## Mumford Road

Our brand new office is on Mumford Rd near the Halifax Shopping Centre, and offers plenty of free parking out front.

[Learn More](https://www.ourdentist.ca/locations/mumford-road)

Image

![Hallway of the Spring Garden Road location at the Halifax Professional Building](https://www.ourdentist.ca/sites/www.ourdentist.ca/files/styles/extra_large/public/images/spring-garden-square.webp?itok=5Lxb_kR3)

## Spring Garden Road

Our comfortable and welcoming office, conveniently located on Spring Garden Rd at Robie St, offers plenty of nearby parking.

[Learn More](https://www.ourdentist.ca/locations/spring-garden)

Image

![Dental Assistant Scanning Patient Using iTero](https://www.ourdentist.ca/sites/www.ourdentist.ca/files/styles/extra_large/public/2021-12/Patient.jpg.webp?itok=kfqsDYQ1)

## New patients welcome!

- Two convenient locations
- 5 Star patient reviews
- Experienced and caring professional teams

[Become a Patient](https://www.ourdentist.ca/become-patient)

## Comprehensive Dental Care Proudly providing Halifax with trusted dental services

Image

![Dental Hygienist demonstrating to young patient how to brush using a dental model](https://www.ourdentist.ca/sites/www.ourdentist.ca/files/styles/extra_large/public/images/knowledge-compassion-excellence.jpg.webp?itok=1LTxGJYV)

Our dedicated team of highly skilled and compassionate professionals takes great pleasure in providing you with a wide array of dental services. We are committed to ensuring your oral health and well-being, and we strive to deliver outstanding care that meets your individual needs. Whether you require routine check-ups, preventive care, or tailored treatments, our team is here to serve you with a steadfast commitment and a genuine concern for your overall dental experience. Your satisfaction and comfort are our top priorities, and we look forward to being your trusted partners in maintaining a healthy and beautiful smile.

Image

![Invisalign Provider logo](https://www.ourdentist.ca/sites/www.ourdentist.ca/files/styles/extra_large/public/images/invisalign-provider.png.webp?itok=cjMjZSvX)

Lawen Dentistry is proud to be an Invisalign Provider. Ask Dr. Lawen how Invisalign can help you get a straighter smile!

[Find out about our _FREE_ Invisalign Consultation](https://www.ourdentist.ca/invisalign-halifax)

Image

![Dr. Daniel Lawen, DDS smiling in front of the Mumford Road Clinic](https://www.ourdentist.ca/sites/www.ourdentist.ca/files/styles/extra_large/public/images/dr-lawen.jpeg.webp?itok=ecr4HG0C)

“Dental hygienist and assistant were friendly, down to earth and made the entire experience really great. Dr. Lawen really makes you forget you’re at the “big scary” dentist office.”

Talie T.

“Everyone at this office is a real life angel. Lori, Michelle, Anna, every single person is happy to see you and completely professional. The Invisalign process is so streamlined they have it down to a science, the whole thing is ridiculously efficient. I wouldn’t consider going to another dentist. ”

Amara H.

“I just finished my Invisalign treatment and can't say enough great things about this clinic. Dr. Lawen and his team are amazing! With their help, my new smile makes me feel more confident and so happy! Thank you everyone at Lawen Dentistry.”

Lacey C.

“Outstanding care and customer service! I have been going to Lawen dentistry for 7 years and they have always been incredible. Kind people, never late, solid dental care, and the dentists are always able to provide meaningful responses to my questions. I would recommend Lawen dentistry to anyone.”

Connor M.

[Read All Reviews](https://birdeye.com/lawen-dentistry-164202617478851)
